widgets.subtitle: A place of grace, heritage, and hope across Mount Stewart, Morell, and St. Peters Bay. Join us as we journey together in faith.
widgets.title: Welcome Home to Community

widgets.body: We are a multi-point charge dedicated to fostering a spirit of inclusivity, compassion, and spiritual growth. Our roots run deep in the red soil of Prince Edward Island, but our branches reach out to embrace the future.
widgets.ctaDescription: Whether you are a lifelong member, a curious visitor, or someone seeking community for the first time — our doors are open. Come as you are.
widgets.quote: To be a vibrant, welcoming community of faith that lives out God's love through service, sanctuary, and song.
widgets.title: Our Shared Vision
